name: Omar Al-Qahtani
whatsapp_message: السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته عمر 👋 لاحظنا أنك حصلت على 57 في الاختبار الأخير وتحضرك ممتاز جداً! 💪 عندك 6 أيام قبل الاختبار القادم، هل تريد مساعدة في المواضيع الصعبة؟ نحن هنا نساعدك.
action: Call or message Omar today to introduce yourself, congratulate him on his perfect attendance, identify which topics he struggled with in the quiz, and arrange a focused 1-on-1 tutoring session before the next quiz in 6 days.
reasoning: Omar has never been contacted despite showing strong commitment (100% attendance) and is currently below passing with a score of 57/100. Early intervention now can prevent further decline and leverage his existing engagement to improve quiz performance.
